description: DST transition golden test cases for schedulex trigger Next() calculations

cases.name: spring_forward_new_york
cases.description: US Eastern: 2026-03-08 02:00 → 03:00 (lose 1 hour). DailyAt(3,30) should fire at 03:30 EDT (UTC-4), not skip.

cases.name: fall_back_new_york
cases.description: US Eastern: 2026-11-01 02:00 → 01:00 (repeat 1 hour). DailyAt(1,30) should fire in the first occurrence (EDT, UTC-4).

cases.name: spring_forward_london
cases.description: UK: 2026-03-29 01:00 → 02:00 (lose 1 hour). DailyAt(2,0) should fire at 02:00 BST (UTC+1).

cases.name: fall_back_london
cases.description: UK: 2026-10-25 02:00 → 01:00 (repeat 1 hour). DailyAt(1,30) resolves to GMT (UTC+0) per Go time.Date behavior.

cases.name: positive_offset_tokyo
cases.description: Asia/Tokyo has no DST (UTC+9). DailyAt(9,0) should always fire at 09:00 JST.

cases.name: half_hour_offset_india
cases.description: Asia/Kolkata has no DST (UTC+5:30). DailyAt(9,30) should fire at 09:30 IST.

cases.name: spring_forward_sydney
cases.description: Australia/Sydney: 2026-10-04 02:00 → 03:00 (lose 1 hour). DailyAt(3,0) fires at 03:00 AEDT (UTC+11).

cases.name: fall_back_sydney
cases.description: Australia/Sydney: 2026-04-05 03:00 → 02:00 (repeat 1 hour). DailyAt(2,30) resolves to AEST (UTC+10) per Go time.Date behavior.
